segments.text: The minecart timed with that banana throw
segments.original_text: バナナ投げのタイミングに合わせたトロッコは

segments.text: And cola's side has been dropping gradually
segments.original_text: だんだんあcola側が落ちていけましたね
採掘を安定してできるようになってきて

segments.text: You can see them gradually adapting better to their opponent's movements
segments.original_text: だんだん相手の動きに対応してきているような印象を受けます

full_text: The minecart timed with that banana throw And cola's side has been dropping gradually Mining becoming more consistent now Wall positioning coming through too You can see them gradually adapting better to their opponent's movements
